events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the arc-flash PPE category label on the equipment exceeds the arc rating documented (DOC + ID tag) on the clothing actually available/worn — a `fail` at `high` risk, since under-rated PPE leaves the worker exposed to burn injury beyond the garment's protective capability. Corrective action is to verify labels against garment DOC/ID and swap in properly rated PPE before energized work proceeds.
